summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: two-run 1D elastic-collision simulation. Wall + floor + heavy BLUE block (mass M) + light ORANGE block (mass 1). ValueTracker t_tr advances precomputed trajectories via always_redraw; live clack count converges to π·10^k for M/m = 10^(2k). Shown for k=0 (3 clacks) and k=1 (31 clacks).
